changeSet.author: kalana
changeSet.sql: CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pgcrypto;

changeSet.author: kalana

rollback.sql: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_audit_log_seal ON audit_log;

changeSet.author: kalana

rollback.sql: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_audit_log_no_update_delete ON audit_log;
DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_audit_log_no_truncate ON audit_log;

changeSet.author: kalana
changeSet.sql: REVOKE UPDATE, DELETE, TRUNCATE ON audit_log FROM PUBLIC;
